headerDisplay: Bold Smart Locks. A Bold Connect hub is required.

authenticate.title: Bold Account
authenticate.description: Authenticate with your Bold account to get API tokens. Tokens are stored encrypted on the hub and refreshed automatically.

accessToken.title: Access Token (manual)
accessToken.description: Access token for the Bold API. Only needed if the OAuth flow above is unavailable.

refreshToken.title: Refresh Token (manual)
refreshToken.description: Refresh token for the Bold API. Only needed if the OAuth flow above is unavailable.

refreshURL.title: Custom Refresh URL (optional)
refreshURL.description: Custom refresh URL for token refreshing. Use this only if you authenticated with a custom backend.

legacyAuthentication.title: Legacy Authentication
legacyAuthentication.description: Switch between default and legacy authentication.

showControllerAsLock.title: Show Bold Connect as Lock
showControllerAsLock.description: Show the Bold Connect hub as a lock instead of a switch.
